name: Salem Techsperts
oneLine: Comedic computer repair shop YouTuber from Salem, Massachusetts known for chaotic teardown videos and refurbishing old PCs.
bio: Andy runs Salem Techsperts, a Salem, Massachusetts computer refurbishing operation that famously originated inside a Subway restaurant. After pivoting to comedic, highly expressive short-form content in 2022 (a viral video of a CPU with a sticker stuck to it accelerated growth), the channel passed 1.4 million subscribers. By June 2024, walk-in repair was discontinued and the business shifted entirely toward YouTube content, sponsorships, and refurbished device sales.
style: fast-cut, expressive, comedic shop vlog with face-cam reactions
notable: ongoing 'why do people pay me to save their old tech' refurbish series
